texto: So many people consider their work a daily punishment. Whereas I love my work as a translator. Translation is a journey over a sea from one shore to the other. Sometimes I think of myself as a smuggler: I cross the frontier of language with my booty of words, ideas, images, and metaphors.
explicacao: Citação de Amara Lakhous sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “So many people consider their work a daily punishment. Whereas I love my work as a translator. Tr…” articula reflexao, language, translation em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e trabalho.

frase_original: So many people consider their work a daily punishment. Whereas I love my work as a translator. Translation is a journey over a sea from one shore to the other. Sometimes I think of myself as a smuggler: I cross the frontier of language with my booty of words, ideas, images, and metaphors.
